mapper.select: SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND is_active = TRUE LIMIT 1

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, u.display_name, g.name AS group_name FROM users u LEFT JOIN groups g ON u.group_id = g.id WHERE u.is_active = TRUE AND ( u.username ILIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' OR u.display_name ILIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' ) ORDER BY u.display_name ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, u.display_name, g.name AS group_name FROM users u LEFT JOIN groups g ON u.group_id = g.id WHERE u.is_active = TRUE AND g.name LIKE '%기술연구소%' ORDER BY u.display_name ASC
SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, u.display_name, g.name AS group_name FROM users u LEFT JOIN groups g ON u.group_id = g.id WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.is_active = TRUE LIMIT 1
SELECT u.id FROM users u LEFT JOIN groups g ON g.id = u.group_id LEFT JOIN roles r ON r.id = u.role_id WHERE u.is_active = TRUE AND (g.name LIKE '%기술연구소%' OR r.name = 'admin')
SELECT name FROM groups WHERE id = #{groupId} LIMIT 1
